name: Contexte tech & projets actifs
description: Stack maîtrisé, projets en cours (karaibart.fr, MCP Logic Pro, LibraryBrain, KlodyAI), MacBook M5 Max 128 GB.
content:
## Priorités actuelles
Clody is actively exploring MCP (Model Context Protocol) integration with DAWs — specifically Logic Pro via the `koltyj/logic-pro-mcp` Swift-native server and IAC Driver MIDI routing — as a way to delegate production tasks to Claude within the existing workflow. A music video project for the zouk track "Sur un océan d'amour" is also active, with an HTML storyboard player built and AI-generated scene images (Runway/Kling/Pika/Luma) identified as the next step toward a proper MP4 export. Clody has recently acquired a MacBook Pro M5 Max (128GB RAM, 2TB) optimized for local AI inference via Ollama/MLX, replacing or supplementing a prior M2 Max setup.

## Projets et acquis récents
**AI agent knowledge base:** Six ebooks on AI agents systematically analyzed and synthesized into a master reference (`MASTER_SKILL_BASE_IA_Agents.md`) covering agent architecture, orchestration, memory hierarchies, multi-agent systems, and ethics. Frameworks covered: AutoGen, CrewAI, Semantic Kernel.

**Production knowledge consolidation:** Books analyzed include *Mixing with Impact* (frequency masking, lead/support balance), Owsinski *Recording Engineer's Handbook* (background vocal layering), Katz *Mastering Audio* (K-System, K-14 targeting −14 LUFS). Production decisions: target loudness −9/−10 LUFS integrated for zouk/R&B streaming. Automation of vocal volume, reverb send, delay send, and parallel bus identified as critical skill gap.

**BRIDGE project:** B2B digital toolkit concept for socio-educational structures (MJC, centres sociaux, collèges, associations) to bridge communication between adults (35+) and younger generations (12–30). Pitch deck built with sourced French statistics. Subscription model 500€–2,000€/year, compatible with CAF and European funding.

**Interactive tools built:** Drum machine (CLX-808 React component, 16-step sequencer, 4 measures, synth section with scale/chord selection), melody lab (pitch/scale/BPM detection from audio file upload, chord generation via Claude API), MIDI mapper React app for MPC Q-Link/pad configuration with JSON export.
